title: Delete CloudKit records on resolution/expiry + purge action
description: Audit item 5, docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md. Neither side ever deletes records; expires_at is not a TTL.

title: Redact relay payload to companion-rendered fields
description: Audit item 4, docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md. payload_for_relay (mcp.rs:143) ships the whole AskRequest.

title: Decide relay fate: implement Mac-side answer ingest or gate the feature
description: Audit item 3, docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md. Companion submits answers to CloudKit but no Mac-side subscription/poll ingests them into registry.resolve; round-trip never completes. Default to disabled until it works.

title: Document all four network paths in SECURITY.md + README
description: Audit item 2, docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md. Updater, Apple speech model download, HuggingFace TTS model download, CloudKit relay when enabled — current docs claim the updater is the only exception.

title: Relay opt-in: default iphone routing Off + companion-sync setting + entitlement/config coherence
description: Audit item 1, docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md. RoutingConfig::default() sets iphone: Fallback (routing.rs:66,90) while the shipped build's entitlement is removed — make relay opt-in with first-run disclosure and a visible 'not available in this build' state.

title: Panel timed out mid-typing and discarded user's text (data loss)
description: User reported: typing into a prompt text field, the panel timed out and closed, losing the typed input. Fix (0.3.2): keep-alive floors the prompt deadline on every focus/input (KEEPALIVE_EDIT_S=600) and relaxes to 45s on blur; floor is enforced both in the webview hide-timer (App.tsx, self-rescheduling against max(budget, interactionFloor)) AND server-side (registry.rs Pending.min_deadline + effective_deadline(), resettable wait loop, new keepalive command/Tauri cmd) so a delivered answer still resolves; in-progress text also saved to localStorage draft as a safety net. Requirement from user: NEVER close an actively-edited window; reset timeout to >=45s after editing stops; never lose user data.
close_reason: Fixed in 0.3.2: keep-alive deadline (webview + server-side registry) + draft safety net.

title: 0.3.0 macOS build bricked: restricted iCloud entitlements without provisioning profile (AMFI SIGKILL)
description: 0.3.0 added iCloud/CloudKit restricted entitlements to src-tauri/Entitlements.plist for the relay. Developer-ID bundles ship no embedded.provisionprofile, so AMFI SIGKILLs the app at launch (exit 137) -> 'The application cenno cannot be opened'. codesign+notarization pass, so dry-run looked clean. Fix: removed iCloud entitlements (relay already gated to run without them); bumped 0.3.1; hardened scripts/release.sh with a static restricted-entitlement/profile guard + live launch smoke-test that reject this brick before publish. Both verified to catch the broken bundle.
close_reason: Fixed in 0.3.1: dropped restricted iCloud entitlements, hardened release.sh with launch smoke-test + provisioning-profile guard. 0.3.1 published, OTA signature verified, v0.3.0 deleted.

title: tray 'Show pending prompt' is unreachable-dead: suppression guard + dismiss semantics leave no state where it acts
description:
replay_pending() (lib.rs:399) is the handler for the tray item (tray.rs:199) and the reopen shortcut. Every reachable prompt state makes it a silent no-op:

1. Prompt parked while paused/fullscreen — the ONE state the item exists for — is blocked by the suppression guard at the top of replay_pending ('replay skipped — still suppressed'). An explicit user click should override suppression.
2. Dismissed (✕ or dismiss_pending MCP): registry.dismiss() consumes the tx, so pending() excludes it — yet the menu item's own comment (tray.rs:95) promises recovery 'after it was dismissed'. Not resurrectable by design (agent already got TimedOut) — comment/menu copy is wrong.
3. Timed out: deadline passed → excluded from pending().
4. Still on screen: replay re-emits the same prompt — no visible change.

An unsuppressed pending prompt is always already shown (arrival emit + schedule_panel_show; pause-expiry timer and fullscreen-toggle-off both auto-replay), so the 'hidden but pending and unsuppressed' state the item could serve essentially never exists.

Proposed fix: add force flag to replay_pending that bypasses the suppression check for the explicit tray click / global shortcut; fix the tray.rs:95 comment re dismiss; optionally disable the menu item (or retitle) when pending() is empty so the no-op is visible.

title: Sync panel display with TTS readiness; cancel speech on answer/dismiss
description:
When voice output is enabled, the panel currently appears before TTS audio is generated, leaving a noticeable gap between the panel showing and speech starting. Sometimes the user answers and closes the panel before playback even begins — the voice then plays for an already-dismissed prompt.

Desired behavior:
1. When a prompt will be spoken, defer showing the panel until the TTS audio is ready (or starts playing), so panel + voice arrive together. Keep a fallback: if synthesis exceeds a short deadline (~2-3s), show the panel anyway rather than delaying the prompt indefinitely.
2. Cancel/stop synthesis and playback the moment the prompt is answered or dismissed — never speak for a closed panel.

Likely touch points: frontend tts_speak call flow (PromptPanel.tsx / useTtsPlayer), tts.rs + supertonic synthesis path, and the show-panel sequencing in lib.rs/bridge.rs.
close_reason: Implemented, live-tested on a release build, merged via PR #8: deferred panel-show handshake (panel_ready + 2.5s fallback), cancel-safe Supertonic stop via generation gate, 200ms fade-out on stop.

title: Audit P1 batch: retention+VACUUM, CI, model hash pinning, registry eviction, cancellation, single-instance, relay consistency
description: Items 6-12 of docs/AUDIT-2026-07.md improvement list (Codex-audited). Split into tasks when picked up.

title: Voice-out (sound-out) silent: panel gates on startup config snapshot, not live config
description: Repro: enable/retune voice-out in cenno settings while the app is already running, then trigger a prompt -> no speech, even though settings 'test voice' works. Root cause: the prompt panel resolves the TTS gate (shouldSpeak) from getTts(), populated once at startup via the get_user_config command (the launch snapshot). Settings test-playback reads fresh (read_config_file) AND bypasses the gate, so it always works -> masks the bug. tts_speak itself already reads config fresh per call, but the GATE did not, so every prompt after the user turned voice-out on was silently dropped until an app restart refreshed the snapshot (verified live: a restart made prompts speak). Fix: useTtsPlayer now re-reads tts config fresh from disk (new userConfig.readFreshTts -> read_config_file) per prompt before gating, so settings changes take effect on the next prompt with no restart. Also added: 'cenno' -> 'chenno' phonetic respelling in normalizeForSpeech (Italian pronunciation). Frontend-only; ships in next release.

title: CloudKit relay crashes app on unentitled/dev build
description: cenno_relay_write_prompt -> makeDB() builds CKContainer(iCloud.app.cenno).privateCloudDatabase. On an ad-hoc/unsigned local build (no icloud-container-identifiers entitlement), CloudKit raises an ObjC exception outside any do/catch -> SIGTRAP, whole app crashes (faultingThread in cenno_relay_write_prompt closure). Repro: companion routing targets non-empty + a prompt published on a locally-built app. Fix: gate relay FFI on iCloud entitlement presence so it no-ops when CloudKit unavailable.
close_reason: Gated relay FFI on iCloud entitlement (SecTaskCopyValueForEntitlement); no-ops when CloudKit unavailable instead of trapping

title: TestFlight: verify full prompt loop on Production build
description: After aps-environment=production + Production CloudKit schema deploy, prove write -> device displays prompt -> answer flips record to answered, on a Production/Distribution build via TestFlight. Gate before submitting for review.
notes: Build 1.0(1) uploaded to App Store Connect / TestFlight successfully 2026-06-18 (xcodebuild Upload succeeded, processing). Path: archive CennoiPhone -> exportArchive app-store-connect with Admin API key KY2K3HP233. REMAINING (human device test): once the build finishes processing, install via TestFlight on a device signed into the SAME iCloud as the Mac writer (glebis+apple@gmail.com), trigger an MCP ask_user prompt, confirm it displays on Production CloudKit and answering flips the record to answered. This is the final gate before submitting for review.

title: App Store Connect: register bundle IDs + create app record
description: Register App IDs app.cenno.companion (+ watch) with iCloud(CloudKit) + Push Notifications capabilities, and create the App Store Connect app record. Reserve the store-facing name (check 'Cenno' availability; fall back to a qualified name if taken). Web/portal work.
notes: DONE 2026-06-16: App Store Connect record created. Store name 'Cenno' was TAKEN; used 'Cenno Companion' as store name (home-screen label stays 'Cenno' via CFBundleDisplayName). Apple ID 6780882240, SKU cenno-companion, iOS, English (U.S.), Bundle ID app.cenno.companion, Full Access. App ID capabilities (iCloud/CloudKit/Push) already verified.
close_reason: App Store Connect app record created (Apple ID 6780882240, store name 'Cenno Companion', bundle app.cenno.companion). Name 'Cenno' was taken; home-screen label remains 'Cenno'.

title: App Store distribution signing: cert + provisioning profiles
description: Ensure an Apple Distribution certificate exists and App Store provisioning profiles cover app.cenno.companion + app.cenno.companion.watch with the iCloud/CloudKit + push capabilities. CODE_SIGN_STYLE is Automatic, so Xcode can mint these on Archive/Distribute; confirm or create manually in the Developer portal.
close_reason: Distribution signing PROVEN via successful App Store upload. xcodebuild -exportArchive (method app-store-connect, automatic signing, -allowProvisioningUpdates) minted the Apple Distribution cert + App Store provisioning profiles for app.cenno.companion + .watch and signed the build. Required a NEW Admin-role App Store Connect API key (KY2K3HP233) — the pre-existing Developer-role key (8S89DZRB8R) lacked cloud-signing permission. Archive scheme: CennoiPhone (embeds Watch+Shared). Build 1.0(1) uploaded OK 2026-06-18.

title: Deploy CloudKit schema to Production environment
description: Indexes (state/expires_at QUERYABLE, created_at SORTABLE) auto-create only in Development on first save. Must explicitly Deploy Schema Changes -> Production in CloudKit Dashboard or queries return empty for shipped users. Verify record types/zone Prompts exist in Production.
close_reason: Deployed Prompt record type + 19 indexes (state/expires_at queryable, created_at sortable) + role perms to Production CloudKit via dashboard Deploy Schema Changes. Verified: Production env now lists Prompt (13 fields). Additive deploy, no data loss.

title: Switch aps-environment development -> production
description: iPhone entitlement currently pins aps-environment=development; TestFlight/App Store builds need production APNs + Production CloudKit. Update CennoiPhone.entitlements (and any watch equivalent). This is the top relay blocker for real users.
close_reason: Per-config entitlements: Debug=development, Release=production aps-environment. Added CennoiPhone.Release.entitlements, switched iPhone target to per-config CODE_SIGN_ENTITLEMENTS in project.yml, regenerated + verified via showBuildSettings.

title: Finalize Cenno companion (iPhone + Watch) for App Store release
description: Epic tracking everything needed to ship the CennoCompanion iPhone + Watch apps to TestFlight/App Store. The relay loop is proven only in Development CloudKit; production path (Production CloudKit + Distribution signing + App Store Connect records + metadata) is unstarted. See memory cenno-cloudkit-relay-delivery.

comments.author: glebis
comments.text: Implemented + 3-round codex audit (all findings closed: cross-prompt leak via session-nonce keys, empty-clear, keepalive-on-restore, startup-order panic, NUL byte). Built+installed 0.3.2 locally, restarted. Pending: user interactive verification, then commit/merge.

title: Pre-existing: tests/mcp_socket.rs fails to compile (start_socket_server signature drift)
description: cargo test (integration) fails: tests/mcp_socket.rs calls start_socket_server with args not matching its current signature (E0061/E0277, ~24 errors, e.g. passing Option where impl Fn() expected). Unrelated to the keepalive change (lib + unit tests compile and pass). Blocks 'cargo test' full run; use 'cargo test --lib' meanwhile. Update the integration test to the current start_socket_server signature.

title: cenno voice-flow primitive: external answer + dismiss handle
description: Agent-driven voice Q&A (cenno speaks question, user answers via external STT like Spokenly) needs the panel to persist while the user answers, then dismiss the moment the external answer lands. Today cenno exposes only ask_user (blocks on in-panel answer) — no external resolve/dismiss. Add: (a) MCP/CLI to dismiss or answer a prompt by id, OR (b) a 'speak + show self-card' notify mode that auto-dismisses on a follow-up call. Surfaced live while wiring cenno-voice + Spokenly. Also: Spokenly mutes playback while recording, so speak must fully finish before the mic opens (handled by adaptive gap); panel timeout-based hide fires too early.
notes: dismiss_pending MCP tool landed (commit 403e88b) — the external dismiss handle works end-to-end (validated live with cenno voice + Spokenly). Remaining: a fully internal voice-flow mode so dismissal is instant (no agent round-trip), and adaptive speak/listen timing baked in.

title: Review /cenno skill: update + voice support
description: Audit skills/cenno (SKILL.md + scripts) for staleness and ensure it documents/supports voice-out (sound-out): say summaries, urgency gating, engine=supertonic, voice selection F1-F5/M1-M5.

Tabs: Settings (Voice/TTS engine+voice+test, behavior toggles incl launch-at-login, hide-from-dock; defaults flow/theme), Integration (MCP config snippet + copy, shell one-liner, skill install), About (what cenno is, GitHub/LinkedIn/repo links, version). First prototype.

description: supertonic::model_dir uses config.tts.model_path if set+valid, else default cache, else AVSpeech fallback. Bad path never crashes.
close_reason: model_dir honors tts.model_path (valid→custom, invalid→default→AVSpeech); ENGINE keyed by resolved dir; pick_model_dir unit-tested.

title: spike: choose Supertonic integration path (Swift SDK vs Rust ort) — build-weight + latency
description: Child of cenno-0wc (Supertonic on-device TTS). See docs/factory/2026-06-22-supertonic-tts/goal.md.
close_reason: Spike validated Rust ort 2.0 path: builds 32s, self-contained preprocessing (no g2p/subprocess), CPU. Latency=text-len x steps: short say @steps5 ~0.5s (meets target), long body @steps8 ~6s (too slow). Mitigation: speak short say + cap steps ~5-6. Assets ~380MB on disk.

title: sound-out: Supertonic on-device TTS backend (better voice, stays R1)
description: Integrate Supertonic (99M, ONNX, MIT, native Swift+Rust SDK; https://github.com/supertone-inc/supertonic) as a higher-quality on-device TTS backend behind tts_speak, with AVSpeechSynthesizer as fallback. Fully local — no cloud, no API keys, privacy stays R1 (unlike cloud providers cenno-fx5). Slots into existing CennoVoice Swift-FFI. Vault refs: ai-research/Technology/Supertonic.md. Size-matched alternatives if it disappoints: Kokoro (~82M, already used in Pipecat stack), PocketTTS, MeloTTS. Needs: model asset download/caching, voice selection config, Swift SDK wiring. Smallest slice = Supertonic English speaking the say/normalized text, fallback to AVSpeech on load failure.

title: sound-out: select a better on-device voice (Enhanced/Premium/Siri neural)
description: Quick win: default AVSpeechVoice sounds plain. Pick a high-quality installed voice (enhanced/premium/Siri) via AVSpeechSynthesisVoice, configurable in ~/.cenno tts.voice. Big quality jump, still on-device/no network.
close_reason: Shipped + verified by ear: say-field speaks short summary instead of body; auto-selected premium on-device voice. User approved sound.

title: sound-out: dedicated agent-provided 'say' text (short spoken summary)
description: GOAL AMENDMENT from live demo: reading the full title+body aloud is hard to listen to. Add optional AskRequest.say (or tts_text) that, when present, is spoken INSTEAD of the normalized body — a short summary the agent writes for the ear. Falls back to body when absent. Frontend useTtsPlayer prefers say when set.
close_reason: Shipped + verified by ear: say-field speaks short summary instead of body; auto-selected premium on-device voice. User approved sound.

Must never drop body substance. TDD with the db-refactor example as a fixture. This is the highest-logic unit.

Shipped v0.2.0 had neither profile nor icloud entitlements, so the relay was a silent no-op.

Distribute as a notarized Developer-ID DMG + Homebrew + self-updater. Pipeline EXISTS (scripts/release.sh expects APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY='Developer ID Application: … (79SP7TM5PH)' + APPLE_API_KEY/ISSUER/KEY_PATH; bundle_dmg.sh --notarize uses notarytool submit --wait + staple). GAP: shipped /Applications/cenno.app is currently signed 'Apple Development' (not Developer ID) and NOT notarized.

(1) Export compliance: ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption=false now on BOTH companion + watch targets via project.yml (commit 70e8ab7) — TestFlight won't prompt per-build. (2) App Privacy nutrition label set to 'Data Not Collected' in ASC (audit confirmed no analytics/SDKs/external networking; prompt data lives in user's private CloudKit, developer has no access). (3) Privacy Policy URL set to https://cenno.salient.community/privacy (new page deployed, commit ac15fb7). NOTE: App Privacy 'Publish' button intentionally left for app-submission time (it's gated to the review flow); both inputs are saved.

title: Urgency-priority ordering in PromptRegistry::pending()
close_reason: Closed

title: Feature-factory pilot: concurrent-prompt queueing per policy
Local-file image serving for prompts (scoped asset protocol)
description: Descoped 2026-07-13: interactive image controls (select/zoom/compare, per-image reactions) are not a priority — fixed scaling stands (existing variant caps; recommended default fit:contain + mediumFeature, largeFeature when the image is the subject; documented via cenno-bee). Remaining scope here: let agents show LOCAL image files in A2UI Image — webview can't read arbitrary paths; needs deliberately scoped Tauri asset protocol (prompts are untrusted input, see SECURITY.md).

title: cenno skill: widget-advisor guide — which widget for which question
description: Docs-only addition to skills/cenno/SKILL.md (backlog 2026-07-13): a decision table mapping question types to widgets (confirm/choice/scale/slider/voice_text/a2ui media). Buildable during revenue focus.

title: User-initiated channel — hotkey dictation → agent daemon via wait_for_user_message
description: Second wedge (docs/BACKLOG.md 2026-07-13). Global hotkey starts voice.rs dictation outside any prompt; utterance lands in a queue exposed as a long-poll MCP tool (wait_for_user_message) so any MCP-capable agent can be the brain. Cenno stays local-only; daemon holds keys/MCPs. First daemon can be 'claude -p' per utterance. Blocked-by conceptually: tell_user (responses need an outbound path).

title: sound-out: voice-picker settings UI (choose Supertonic style)
description: Live-demo feedback: user wants a settings UI to choose the TTS voice (Supertonic style F1-F5/M1-M5), rather than editing ~/.cenno tts.voice by hand. Voice is already config-driven; this is the UI. Also note: user mentioned the cenno<->spokenly dictation interaction is worth considering. (Spokenly's own popup size is out of cenno scope.)
close_reason: Settings window shipped + verified live: opens from tray, renders, reflects+writes config (no clobber — panel/widgets/routing preserved), engine/voice persist, model status shows installed, Supertonic test voice works (no fallback), output-device picker + delete-model wired.

title: sound-out: emotional/prosody markup for supporting TTS providers
description: Pass through emotional/prosody markup to providers that accept it; graceful fallback for those that don't. Depends on cloud providers. Follow-on to epic cenno-dib.

title: sound-out: ElevenLabs sound-generation earcons per urgency
description: Generate/caches earcons (alert tones) from a prompt via ElevenLabs sound-gen API; play a distinct cue per urgency before/with speech. Follow-on to epic cenno-dib.

title: sound-out: pluggable cloud TTS providers (Groq/OpenAI/Cartesia/ElevenLabs)
description: Add a provider abstraction behind tts_speak so config can select a cloud TTS provider + key (env/secrets, never committed). Privacy: only send prompt text when user explicitly configured a cloud provider. Revisit R-classification + data-handling note. Follow-on to epic cenno-dib.
notes: DEPRIORITIZED in favor of local-first: user prefers a better LOCAL model (Supertonic, see new issue) over cloud to keep privacy at R1. Cloud only if local quality proves insufficient.
